A Good Day to Die Hard (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $67,349,198Details
International Box Office $236,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $304,249,198
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $15,641,281
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,770,175
Total $29,411,456
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Since the first Die Hard in 1988, John McClane has found himself in the wrong place at the wrong time, with the skills and attitude to always be the last man standing, making him enemy #1 for terrorists the world over. Now, McClane faces his greatest challenge ever, this time on an international stage, when his estranged son Jack is caught up in the daring prison escape of a rogue Russian leader, and father and son McClane must work together to keep each other alive and keep the world safe for democracy.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$24,834,845 (36.9% of total gross)
Legs:2.71 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:22.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$92,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,553 opening theaters/3,555 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $99,077,047

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 14th, 2013 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
February 14th, 2013 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: February 6th, 2013 (Wide) (Indonesia)
February 7th, 2013 (Wide) (South Korea)
February 7th, 2013 (Wide) (Malaysia)
February 7th, 2013 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
February 7th, 2013 (Wide) (Singapore)
Video Release: June 4th, 2013 by Fox Home Entertainment

Franchise: Die Hard

Synopsis

Since the first Die Hard in 1988, John McClane has found himself in the wrong place at the wrong time, with the skills and attitude to always be the last man standing, making him enemy #1 for terrorists the world over. Now, McClane faces his greatest challenge ever, this time on an international stage, when his estranged son Jack is caught up in the daring prison escape of a rogue Russian leader, and father and son McClane must work together to keep each other alive and keep the world safe for democracy.
